title: NZ Information Sharing Standard – Purpose and Scope
description: New Zealand government standard (effective 1 July 2025) mandating requirements for public service agencies sharing personal information with non-government third parties. Covers legally binding information sharing agreements, risk assessment, controls, and compliance with privacy and security obligations.
